channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Nvidia wants enterprises to run agents safely. NemoClaw is how.
item.description: Getting enterprises to adopt autonomous agents isn't a model problem — it's a governance problem. That's the gap NemoClaw is built to close. NemoClaw is Nvidia's collection of open blueprints for...

item.title: Penpot for Developers: The Open-Source Design Tool That Speaks Your Language
item.description: Most design tools treat developers as an afterthought. You get handed a file, you squint at a spec panel, and you manually translate someone else's pixels into code that drifts out of sync the...

item.title: Hello Dev Community 👋
item.description: Hi everyone, I'm Vibudh, a software engineer from India who enjoys building things with code and constantly learning new technologies. I have graduated with a degree in Computer Science, and over...

item.title: Autonomous Beyond the Chatbox: Why AI Agents Require Dedicated Infrastructure to Work
item.description: The conversation surrounding artificial intelligence is undergoing a massive structural shift. For the past few years, consumer AI has been defined by chat interfaces—static, reactive windows...

item.title: Pinning what we couldn't pin: the case for investing in agentic tooling
item.description: Last week I attributed a measured performance improvement on a platform I work on to a specific sequence of technical components. That sounds unremarkable until you know I had been circling the...

item.title: CVE & CVSS Scores: Strategic Integration in Vulnerability Management
item.description: Risk-Based Prioritization: The Context Factor Most companies only look at the standard (Base) score of a CVE. However, a real risk model should consider 3 key parameters: Base Metrics : The...

item.title: git/Js-worm-malware
item.description: I have documented the Git Worm malware incident that halted our team for 2 days and infected 100+ repositories. https://sharonrosario.space/case-studies/git-worm-malware-incident The case study...

item.title: I built a fully local AI assistant at 16 — no cloud, no API keys, runs on your GPU
item.description: I'm 16, from Pune, India. For the past couple of years I've been building O-AI — a fully local AI desktop assistant. No cloud. No API keys. No data leaving your machine. Everything runs on your...

item.title: KI-Agenten für die Automatisierung täglicher Arbeit — tool-cal
item.description: KI-Agenten für die Automatisierung täglicher Arbeit — tool-cal Große Sprachmodelle haben die Art und Weise, wie wir mit Informationen interagieren, grundlegend verändert. Doch so beeindruckend die...

item.title: Tool Calling, Explained: How AI Agents Decide What to Do Next
item.description: Tool Calling, Explained: How AI Agents Decide What to Do Next Large language models have transformed how we interact with software, moving us from rigid command-line interfaces to fluid,...

item.title: Meta Pauses Employee-Tracking Program Following Internal Data Leak
item.description: The move comes after the company left potentially sensitive data from the initiative exposed internally.

item.title: Valve describes just how brutal RAM negotiations are in 2026
item.description: Valve's Steam Machine finally has a price: a whopping $1,049 for the 512GB configuration or $1,349 for the 2TB version. And those are without bundled controllers, which drive up the cost more. The...

item.title: The AI world is getting ‘loopy’
item.description: The loop takes agentic AI a step further by authorizing a swarm of agents to work continuously in the background, endlessly.

item.title: Meta Exposed Data Internally From Its Controversial Employee-Tracking Program
item.description: Employees had previously raised concerns about the initiative, which involves collecting workers’ keystroke data to train AI models.

item.title: AI chipmaker Groq confirms $650M raise, re-staffs after Nvidia’s $20B not-acqui-hire deal
item.description: What does an AI company do after one of those not-acqui-hire deals? Groq raised money, is leaning into its neocloud business, and is hiring new execs.

item.title: Nvidia wants to cut data center water use, but that’s not the same as fixing AI’s water problem
item.description: Nvidia announced a new cooling system that cuts water use inside the data center. But it does nothing to address AI's biggest water use — fossil fuel power plants.

item.title: AI is cursing renters with the promise of impossible homes
item.description: Joyce, a native New Yorker, didn't think finding her first solo apartment in the city would be easy. But she also didn't think it'd be "hell." After looking at a lot of tiny, overpriced places she...

item.title: Following user outcry, AMD reinstates memory encryption in consumer CPUs
item.description: Critics saw the move as an underhanded way to steer them toward more costly chips.

item.title: Google DeepMind bets $75M on AI’s future in Hollywood with A24 deal
item.description: Google DeepMind and A24 are teaming up to build AI filmmaking tools.

item.title: ShapedPlugin WordPress Pro Plugins Backdoored in Supply Chain Attack
item.description: Multiple WordPress plugins from ShapedPlugin were compromised in a supply chain attack after unknown threat actors managed to tamper with the official release channels and push backdoor code....

item.title: Three things to watch amid Anthropic’s latest feud with the government
item.description: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. For those of you enjoying your summer unaware of...

item.title: The Apple Watch SE 3 is just $199 for Prime Day
item.description: The Apple Watch SE 3 is at an all-time low of $199, making the sleeper hit of last year’s Apple Watches an even better value. While the Series 11 and Ultra 3 were iterative updates, the SE 3 was a...

item.title: The Steam Machine is the start of an even more expensive future for game consoles
item.description: It's no secret that just about every aspect of video games is getting more expensive. Game consoles are getting regular price hikes, PC components are spiking in cost, and the golden age of...

item.title: Amazon is testing Alexa+ in India with Hindi support
item.description: Amazon is planning to increase the footprint of its new conversational AI assistant Alexa+ to India and is inviting users in the country to test out a Hindi-language version.

item.title: Google invests in A24 to build AI movie tools
item.description: Google's DeepMind AI lab is teaming up with A24 to develop new movie production technologies that aim to help future filmmakers "expand their storytelling possibilities." As part of this new...

item.title: Valve is working with AMD to bring FSR 4 to the Steam Machine
item.description: The Steam Machine is a cool little console that's about as powerful as a PlayStation 5, according to my colleague Sean Hollister's in-depth review. But one area where it lags behind is with its...

item.title: Here’s how you can reserve a Steam Machine
item.description: The Steam Machine is here, but getting one is a little complicated. Valve is taking preorders using a reservation system, which is intended to make the process more fair and harder for bots to...

item.title: Valve will finally let you build your own Steam Machine with SteamOS for desktop
item.description: If you don't get lucky with Valve's Steam Machine reservation system, you can make your own Steam Machine instead. Valve says that "starting with the SteamOS 3.8 release, you can put together your...

item.title: Valve explains why it isn’t subsidizing the Steam Machine
item.description: Valve finally announced the price of the Steam Machine, and like a lot of new gadgets these days, it's not cheap: It starts at $1,049 for a 512GB model, and a 2TB model costs $300 more....

item.title: OpenAI Launches Full-Scale Effort to Patch Open-Source Bugs as It Takes on Anthropic’s Mythos
item.description: Amid concerns about AI models’ cybersecurity capabilities, OpenAI revealed an improved version of GPT-5.5-Cyber and its “Patch the Planet” initiative to fix open-source software bugs.
